user_query: The workshop on Day 3 ends at 11am and then I have nothing until the AGO at noon. Add a coffee break in between. there's a good cafe near the gallery.

fields.name: Cafe near AGO (coffee break)
fields.description: Quick coffee and pastry at a well-regarded cafe located a short walk from the Art Gallery of Ontario — convenient spot to recharge between the morning workshop and the AGO visit.

insertion_point.reasoning: Workshop ends at 11:00 AM and the AGO visit starts at 12:00 PM; inserting a 30-minute coffee break at position 2 (after the morning workshop, before the AGO) provides a comfortable transition and is close to the gallery.
